description: Migrate remaining teacher-facing server data paths from legacy Drizzle helpers to Convex internal queries, add missing page coverage, and keep teacher dashboards aligned with the Convex-only architecture.
deviation_notes: The runtime migration was completed by moving teacher pages directly onto new internal Convex queries rather than preserving the old Drizzle-backed fetch-layer wrappers. Pure view-model assembly helpers remained unchanged and were reused inside the Convex query module.
